title: Jojo's Origins: Jcraft Origins Addon
description: An origin datapack that adds new origins for the Jcraft Mod
body:
This datapack adds 3 new origins that can be unlocked or chosen at the beginning of the game, all within the balance and mechanics of Jcraft. A list below shows all of the ones that can be unlocked/chosen
- Hamon
- Inherited Stand User
- Human (Jojos)

Most origins require items to be obtained. This datapack has been created for Forge 1.20.1 but should work with other Forge Versions of the Origins and Jcraft Mod. It is very reccomended to remove the base origins (including human) to make this experience more immersive for the mod. 

Please Note: This datapack requires **Origins, and ofc Jcraft**. In addition, this datapack is in a stage of development so expect changes and fixes in the near future.
